CustomField.formula: IF(!ISBLANK(Contact__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/contact/"+ Contact__c, Contact__r.FirstName + " " + Contact__r.LastName + IF(Right(Contact__r.LastName, 1)="s", "'", "'s")), IF(!ISBLANK(Organization__c), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/account/"+ Organization__c, Organization__r.Name + IF(Right(Organization__r.Name, 1)="s", "'", "'s")),"")) + " " + IF(ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "Event"), "Event", RecordType.Name) + IF(!ISBLANK(Posted_By__c), IF(Contact__c = Posted_By__c, "", " (Posted by " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/contact/"+ Posted_By__c, Posted_By__r.FirstName +" " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + ")") , "")
CustomField.label: Portal Posting Details
